title: Department Manager Vacancy at Easyday International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Easyday International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Easyday International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Department Manager at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Easyday International Enterprises:
Easyday International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Easyday International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
